Documentation.short_help: Generate tetrahedral volume mesh from a closed surface using CGAL Mesh_3.
Documentation.long_help: This filter takes a closed triangulated surface mesh (vtkPolyData) and generates a tetrahedral volume mesh (vtkUnstructuredGrid) that fills the interior. It uses CGAL's Mesh_3 package with Polyhedral_mesh_domain_3 and Delaunay refinement. The input surface must be closed (watertight), manifold, composed of triangles only, and free of self-intersections.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: FacetAngle
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Facet Angle
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Lower bound for angles of surface facets (degrees). Smaller values give finer surface approximation.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: FacetSize
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Facet Size
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Upper bound for radii of surface Delaunay balls. Smaller values give finer surface mesh.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: FacetDistance
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Facet Distance
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Upper bound for distance between circumcenter of surface facet and its Delaunay ball center. Smaller values give more accurate surface approximation.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: CellRadiusEdgeRatio
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Cell Radius-Edge Ratio
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Upper bound for ratio of circumradius to shortest edge of tetrahedra. Must be > 2.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: CellSize
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Cell Size
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Upper bound on circumradii of tetrahedra. 0 means no explicit bound (driven by surface criteria). Set > 0 for coarser volume mesh.
